name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for PrivacyGPT

## Problem Statement

What problem would this feature solve? Describe the friction point, missing capability, or user need.

## Proposed Solution

What should the feature look like and how should it work?

## Alternative Approaches

Have you considered any workarounds or alternative solutions?

## Target Audience

Who would benefit from this? (e.g., end users, admins, data researchers)

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or references to similar features in other projects.
